items.title: Rethinking Distributive Justice In Malaysian Health Care — Erwin Khoo Jiayuan
items.summary: The real scandal is not that we are debating how to increase health care capacity in the Klang Valley, but that our national health expenditure as a percentage of the country's GDP remains stagnant despite clear, documented needs across every state. The post Rethinking Distributive Justice In Malaysian Health Care — Erwin Khoo Jiayuan appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: New PJ Hospital, Leased Lifeline, Or A Question We Dare Not Ask? — Dr Rajeentheran Suntheralingam
items.summary: PJ residents have waited a generation for a hospital. They can wait a little longer for the right decision. What they can't afford is a monument to political ambition that stands empty for years or a building that siphons staff from surrounding facilities. The post New PJ Hospital, Leased Lifeline, Or A Question We Dare Not Ask? — Dr Rajeentheran Suntheralingam appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Someone Still Has To Stay: Limiting Housemen Hours Comes At A Cost — Medical Officer
items.summary: I'm not against improving HO welfare, but why is MO welfare always ignored? If fatigue is dangerous for HOs, then fatigue is also dangerous for MOs. If burnout matters for HOs, then burnout also matters for MOs. MOs hold up the health care system. The post Someone Still Has To Stay: Limiting Housemen Hours Comes At A Cost — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: PJ Hospital Project Needs Land Acquisition, Road Upgrades, Says Taman Medan Rep
items.summary: Taman Medan rep Dr Afif Bahardin says the proposed PJ Hospital site in his constituency needs acquisition of the private land and major road upgrades for the jam-packed area. He suggests two alternative sites of government-owned land: UiTM or UIA in PJ. The post PJ Hospital Project Needs Land Acquisition, Road Upgrades, Says Taman Medan Rep appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: UKM’s Public Health PhD Faces NSR Derecognition Push
items.summary: The College of Public Health Medicine and others propose derecognition of UKM's public health PhD by 2027. UKM is the only public health PhD listed for specialist registration on the NSR. A critic says derecognising a local programme sets a bad precedent. The post UKM’s Public Health PhD Faces NSR Derecognition Push appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Act Decisively To Make PJ Public Hospital A Reality — Lim Yi Wei
items.summary: Land for the PJ Hospital site must be rezoned as a 'tapak hospital', while fiscal commitment for the project must be institutionalised through Budget 2027 and the RMK13. The third key moment to ensure project progress is the RMK Mid-Term Review in Q3 2028. The post Act Decisively To Make PJ Public Hospital A Reality — Lim Yi Wei appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: PJ Hospital: Misplaced Priorities And Health Care Injustice — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Zulkifli Ismail & Dr Soo Thian Lian
items.summary: A new PJ hospital is a case of misplaced priorities. There are 13 public specialist hospitals in Selangor. Hospitals aren't at a breaking point because of a lack of beds; they struggle with outdated equipment, underfunded facilities, and overworked staff. The post PJ Hospital: Misplaced Priorities And Health Care Injustice — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Zulkifli Ismail & Dr Soo Thian Lian appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Time To Introduce Dengue Vaccine In Selangor — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Zulkifli Ismail, Dr Nur Abdul Karim & Dr Koh Kar Chai
items.summary: Selangor is Malaysia’s economic engine, and cannot afford to let a preventable disease continue to claim its people and its productivity. The post Time To Introduce Dengue Vaccine In Selangor — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Zulkifli Ismail, Dr Nur Abdul Karim & Dr Koh Kar Chai appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: PJ Hospital Can Be Funded Outside 13MP: Dzulkefly
items.summary: Dr Dzul says the new PJ Hospital can be funded under rolling plans even though the project isn't listed under the 13th Malaysia Plan, expressing hopes that land acquisition will be announced in Budget 2027 and allocations can then be obtained for 2028. The post PJ Hospital Can Be Funded Outside 13MP: Dzulkefly appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Alternative Solution To Petaling Jaya Needs: Reform Access, Not Build Another Hospital — Dr Mohamed Rafick Khan
items.summary: The core driver of PJ's access problem isn't geography, but the absence of a universal financing mechanism. A national health insurance scheme, structured as mandatory social contributions by employers and employees, will fundamentally change the equation. The post Alternative Solution To Petaling Jaya Needs: Reform Access, Not Build Another Hospital — Dr Mohamed Rafick Khan appeared first on CodeBlue .
